modules.module_title: Fundamentals of Art & Drawing (Kala ke Moolbhoot Siddhant)
Color Theory & Application (Rang Siddhant aur Upyog)
Drawing Techniques & Mediums (Chitrankan Takneek aur Madhyam)
Art History & Indian Folk Art (Kala ka Itihaas aur Bharatiya Lok Kala)
Classroom Management & Art Pedagogy (Kaksha Prabandhan aur Kala Shikshan Shastra)
Craft & Creative Activities (Shilpkala aur Rachnatmak Gatividhiyan)

questions.question: Art ka sabse बुनियादी (fundamental) element kya hai?

options.B: Color (Rang)

questions.explanation: Har drawing ya painting ki shuruaat ek line se hoti hai. Isliye, line art ka sabse basic element mana jata hai.

questions.question: 2D shape aur 3D form mein mukhya antar kya hai?

options.A: Shape mein rang hota hai, form mein nahi
options.B: Shape flat hota hai, jabki form mein gehrai (depth) hoti hai
options.D: Form sirf computer se banaya ja sakta hai

questions.explanation: Shape (jaise circle, square) do-dimensional (lambai aur chaudai) hota hai. Form (jaise sphere, cube) teen-dimensional (lambai, chaudai aur gehrai) hota hai.

questions.question: Kisi artwork mein 'Texture' ka kya arth hai?

options.B: Artwork mein istemal hue rang
options.C: Satah (surface) ka feel ya dikhne ka anubhav, jaise khurdura ya chikna

questions.explanation: Texture batata hai ki koi cheez chhoone par ya dekhne par kaisi lagegi - soft, hard, rough, ya smooth.

questions.question: 'Symmetrical Balance' wali drawing kaisi dikhti hai?

options.A: Ek taraf zyada bhari, ek taraf halki
options.B: Center line ke dono taraf ek jaisi (mirror image)
options.D: Sirf kaale aur safed rang ka istemal

questions.explanation: Symmetrical balance mein, yadi aap drawing ke beech mein ek line kheechein, to dono taraf ka design lagbhag ek jaisa ya mirror image jaisa hota hai.

questions.question: Ek drawing mein 'Focal Point' kya hota hai?

options.A: Drawing ka sabse neeche ka hissa
options.B: Woh jagah jahan artist sign karta hai
options.C: Drawing ka mukhya aakarshan ka kendra, jahan dekhne wale ki nazar sabse pehle jaati hai

questions.explanation: Focal point viewer ka dhyan kheenchne ke liye banaya jaata hai. Yeh contrast, color ya placement ke zariye achieve kiya ja sakta hai.

questions.question: Principles of Design mein 'Rhythm' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Elements ko repeat karke ek flow ya movement ka ehsaas paida karna
options.C: Sirf gol aakritiyon ka istemal karna

questions.explanation: Rhythm, jaise music mein hota hai, art mein bhi elements (jaise lines, shapes) ke repetition se ek visual tempo ya movement create karta hai.

questions.question: Drawing mein 'Value' shabd ka kya arth hai?

options.B: Rang ka halkapan ya gehrapan (lightness or darkness)

questions.explanation: Value refers to the lightness or darkness of a color. Ek hi rang ke kai values ho sakte hain, jaise halka neela aur gehra neela.

questions.question: 'Asymmetrical Balance' kaise achieve kiya jata hai?

options.A: Dono taraf bilkul ek jaisi cheezein rakh kar
options.B: Alag-alag visual weight wali cheezon ko is tarah arrange karna ki balance lage
options.C: Sirf ek hi object ko center mein bana kar
options.D: Poore page ko ek hi rang se bhar kar

questions.explanation: Asymmetrical balance mein dono side ek jaise nahi hote, lekin unka visual weight (jaise ek bada halka object aur ek chhota gehra object) balance create karta hai.

questions.question: Ek 'Still Life' drawing mein kya banaya jaata hai?

options.B: Kisi vyakti ka chehra (Portrait)
options.C: Nirjeev vastuyein jaise fal, phool, bartan

questions.explanation: Still Life ek art form hai jismein bejaan (inanimate) vastuyon ke samuh ko draw ya paint kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: 'Contrast' ka principle art mein kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Drawing ko boring banane ke liye
options.B: Elements ke beech antar dikha kar visual interest badhane ke liye
options.C: Sirf professional artists iska istemal karte hain
options.D: Yeh drawing ko sasta dikhata hai

questions.explanation: Contrast (virodhabhas), jaise light aur dark, ya smooth aur rough, ek artwork ko zyada dynamic aur interesting banata hai.

questions.question: Inmein se kaun sa 'Element of Art' nahi hai?

options.B: Shape (Aakriti)

questions.explanation: Line, Shape, Color, Value, Form, Texture, aur Space art ke mukhya elements hain. Emotion art ka parinaam ho sakta hai, element nahi.

questions.question: Ek drawing mein 'Proportion' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Objects ka ek doosre ke sapeksh (relative) size aur scale
options.C: Drawing mein kitne rang istemal hue hain

questions.explanation: Proportion (anupat) yeh sunishchit karta hai ki drawing mein alag-alag hisson ka size ek doosre ke anusaar sahi lage, jaise insan ke chehre mein aankh aur naak ka size.

questions.question: Ek 'composition' mein 'Unity' kaise laayi jaati hai?

options.A: Bahut saare alag-alag styles ka istemal karke
options.B: Sabhi elements ko ek saath milakar ek samagra (cohesive) look dekar
options.D: Sirf ek hi rang ka istemal karke

questions.explanation: Unity tab achieve hoti hai jab artwork ke sabhi hisse ek saath kaam karte hain aur ek poora (complete) hone ka ehsaas dete hain.

questions.question: Kaun si line shaanti (calm) aur sthirta (stability) ka ehsaas dilati hai?

options.B: Horizontal line (Kshitij rekha)

questions.explanation: Horizontal lines, jaise ki kshitij (horizon), aaram aur shaanti ka prateek hoti hain.

questions.question: 'Negative Space' ek drawing mein kya hota hai?

options.B: Mukhya object ke aas-paas ki khaali jagah
options.C: Drawing ka woh hissa jo galat ban gaya ho
options.D: Kaale rang se bhara hua hissa

questions.explanation: Negative space (ya white space) subject ke chaaron taraf ka area hota hai. Iska sahi istemal composition ke liye bahut zaroori hai.

questions.question: Drawing mein 'Pattern' kise kehte hain?

options.B: Kisi element (line, shape, color) ka niyamit (regular) repetition
options.C: Ek galti se bani line ko

questions.explanation: Pattern ek design principle hai jismein art elements ko ek predictable tarike se repeat kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Art mein 'Variety' ka principle kyun use kiya jaata hai?

options.A: Artwork ko ajeeb banane ke liye
options.B: Artwork ko boring hone se bachane aur visual interest create karne ke liye
options.C: Artwork ko jaldi bechne ke liye
options.D: Artwork ko chhota banane ke liye

questions.explanation: Variety (vividhata) ka istemal alag-alag elements jaise alag shapes, textures, ya colors ko ek saath laakar artwork ko zyada engaging banane ke liye kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Primary Colors (Prathamik Rang) kaun se hain?

options.B: Lal, Neela, Peela

questions.explanation: Lal, Neela aur Peela primary colors hain kyunki inhe kisi aur rang ko milakar nahi banaya ja sakta.

questions.question: Lal (Red) aur Peela (Yellow) rang milane se kaun sa Secondary Color banta hai?

options.B: Baingani (Purple)

questions.explanation: Do primary colors ko milane se secondary color banta hai. Lal + Peela = Narangi.

questions.question: 'Color Wheel' kya hai?

options.B: Rangon ko mix karne wala ek bartan
options.C: Rangon ke beech sambandh dikhane wala ek circular diagram
options.D: Bachhon ke khelne ka ek rangin pahiya

questions.explanation: Color wheel ek tool hai jo dikhata hai ki primary, secondary aur tertiary colors ek doosre se kaise sambandhit hain.

questions.question: Warm Colors (Garm Rang) mein aam taur par kaun sa rang pramukh hota hai?

options.B: Hara

questions.explanation: Warm colors jaise lal, narangi, peela suraj aur aag se jude hote hain aur energy aur garmi ka ehsaas dilate hain.

questions.question: Cool Colors (Thande Rang) kaun sa ehsaas dilate hain?

options.B: Shaanti, thandak aur aaram

questions.explanation: Cool colors jaise neela, hara, baingani paani aur aasmaan se jude hote hain aur shaanti ka anubhav karate hain.

questions.question: 'Complementary Colors' color wheel par kahan sthit hote hain?

options.B: Ek doosre ke aamne-saamne (opposite)

questions.explanation: Complementary colors (jaise Lal aur Hara, Neela aur Narangi) color wheel par ek doosre ke vipreet hote hain aur ek saath use karne par contrast create karte hain.

questions.question: Kisi rang mein Safed (White) milane ko kya kehte hain?

options.B: Hue

questions.explanation: Jab kisi shuddh rang (hue) mein safed milaya jaata hai, to use 'Tint' kehte hain, jisse rang halka ho jaata hai.

questions.question: Kisi rang mein Kala (Black) milane ko kya kehte hain?

options.B: Hue

questions.explanation: Jab kisi shuddh rang (hue) mein kala milaya jaata hai, to use 'Shade' kehte hain, jisse rang gehra ho jaata hai.

questions.question: Ek 'Monochromatic' color scheme mein kya hota hai?

options.B: Sirf primary colors
options.C: Ek hi rang ke alag-alag tints, shades aur tones

questions.explanation: Monochromatic scheme mein ek hi mukhya rang (base hue) aur uske variations (halka, gehra, ya greyish) ka istemal hota hai.

questions.question: Peela (Yellow) aur Neela (Blue) milane par kaun sa rang banta hai?

options.B: Narangi (Orange)

questions.explanation: Primary colors Peela aur Neela milkar secondary color Hara banate hain.

questions.question: Tertiary Colors (Tritiya Rang) kaise bante hain?

options.B: Ek primary aur ek paas ke secondary color ko milakar
options.D: Kisi bhi rang mein safed milakar

questions.explanation: Tertiary colors tab bante hain jab ek primary color ko uske bagal wale secondary color se milaya jaata hai. Jaise, peela + hara = peela-hara.

questions.question: Agar aap ek painting mein 'harmony' (samjasya) laana chahte hain, to aap kaun si color scheme chunenge?

options.B: Analogous colors (jo aas-paas ho)

questions.explanation: Analogous colors (jaise peela, peela-hara, hara) color wheel par ek doosre ke paas hote hain aur ek shaant aur harmonious effect paida karte hain.

questions.question: Painting mein 'Wet-on-wet' technique kya hai?

options.A: Sookhe paper par geela rang lagana
options.B: Geelay paper par geela rang lagana

questions.explanation: Wet-on-wet technique, khas taur par watercolor mein, geeli satah par geela paint lagana hota hai jisse rang aapas mein softly blend ho jaate hain.

questions.question: Neutral Colors (Tatasth Rang) kaun se hain?

options.B: Kala, Safed, Grey, Bhura

questions.explanation: Neutral colors mein koi strong color characteristic nahi hota aur ye doosre rangon ko balance karne mein madad karte hain.

questions.question: Rang ka 'Hue' kya hota hai?

options.B: Rang ka shuddh naam (jaise Lal, Peela, Neela)

questions.explanation: Hue rang ka sabse shuddh roop hota hai, bina kisi safed, kaale ya grey ke mishran ke.

questions.question: Watercolor painting ke liye kis tarah ka paper sabse achha hota hai?

options.B: Mota aur texture wala paper jo paani sokh sake

questions.explanation: Watercolor ke liye mote paper (high GSM) ki zaroorat hoti hai taki wo paani se sikude ya phate nahi.

questions.question: Agar aapko ek 'sunset' scene paint karna hai, to aap aam taur par kaun se rangon ka istemal karenge?

options.B: Lal, Narangi, Peela

questions.explanation: Sunset (suryast) ke samay aasmaan mein aam taur par garm rang jaise lal, narangi aur peela dikhai dete hain.

questions.question: Pencil shading mein 'Hatching' technique kya hai?

options.B: Ek hi disha mein paas-paas parallel lines banakar shading karna

questions.explanation: Hatching ek shading technique hai jismein ek hi direction mein lines kheenchi jaati hain. Lines jitni paas hongi, area utna hi dark lagega.

questions.question: Drawing pencils mein 'H' aur 'B' ka kya matlab hota hai?

options.B: Hard aur Black

questions.explanation: 'H' ka matlab Hard hota hai, jo halki line banati hai. 'B' ka matlab Black hota hai, jo soft aur dark line banati hai.

questions.question: Sketching aur Drawing mein mukhya antar kya hai?

options.A: Sketching mein rang bhara jaata hai, drawing mein nahi
options.B: Sketching aam taur par ek quick aur rough kaam hota hai, jabki drawing zyada detailed aur finished hoti hai
options.C: Sketching sirf pencil se hoti hai, drawing kisi bhi cheez se

questions.explanation: Sketching aksar ideas ko jaldi se capture karne ya practice ke liye ki jaati hai. Drawing ek complete artwork hota hai.

questions.question: Drawing mein 'Perspective' ka istemal kyun kiya jaata hai?

options.A: Drawing ko flat dikhane ke liye
options.B: Ek flat surface par gehrai (depth) aur doori ka anubhav paida karne ke liye
options.C: Rangon ko mix karne ke liye
options.D: Drawing ko ajeeb banane ke liye

questions.explanation: Perspective drawing techniques (jaise one-point, two-point) ka istemal 2D satah par 3D space ka bhram paida karne ke liye hota hai.

questions.question: Inmein se kaun sa ek dry drawing medium hai?

options.B: Oil paint

questions.explanation: Charcoal, pencil, aur pastels dry mediums hain, jabki watercolor, oil paint, aur ink wet mediums hain.

questions.question: 'Cross-hatching' technique mein shading kaise ki jaati hai?

options.B: Ek doosre ko kaatti hui (intersecting) lines se

questions.explanation: Cross-hatching mein hatching lines ke upar ek aur set of lines alag angle par banayi jaati hain, jisse area aur dark ho jaata hai.

questions.question: Oil pastels aur wax crayons mein kya mukhya antar hai?

options.B: Oil pastels zyada creamy hote hain aur aasani se blend ho jaate hain, jabki crayons waxy hote hain
options.C: Oil pastels sirf kaale rang mein aate hain
options.D: Crayons paani mein ghul jaate hain

questions.explanation: Oil pastels mein oil hota hai, jisse ve soft aur blendable hote hain. Wax crayons mom se bante hain aur hard hote hain.

questions.question: One-point perspective mein sabhi parallel lines kahan jaakar milti hui dikhti hain?

options.B: Ek single 'Vanishing Point' par

questions.explanation: One-point perspective mein, jo lines viewer se door ja rahi hain, ve sab horizon line par ek hi vanishing point par converge hoti hain.

questions.question: Chhote bachhon ko drawing sikhane ki shuruaat karne ke liye sabse achha medium kya hai?

options.B: Charcoal sticks
options.C: Mote wax crayons ya non-toxic sketch pens

questions.explanation: Chhote bachhon ke liye crayons jaise medium safe, aasani se pakadne wale aur non-toxic hone chahiye.

questions.question: 'Stippling' ya 'Pointillism' shading technique mein kya istemal hota hai?

options.B: Bahut saare chhote-chhote dots (bindu)

questions.explanation: Stippling mein value aur texture create karne ke liye dots ka istemal kiya jaata hai. Jahan dots paas-paas hote hain, wahan dark area banta hai.

questions.question: Ek 'Grid Method' ka istemal drawing mein kyun kiya jaata hai?

options.A: Drawing ko aasan banane ke liye
options.B: Ek reference photo ko accurately copy karne aur proportion sahi rakhne ke liye
options.C: Drawing mein pattern banane ke liye
options.D: Drawing ko aakhir mein kaatne ke liye

questions.explanation: Grid method mein reference image aur drawing paper dono par grid banakar, har square ko alag-alag copy kiya jaata hai, jisse accuracy badhti hai.

questions.question: Kaun si pencil sabse dark (gehri) line banayegi?

options.B: HB

questions.explanation: Pencil mein 'B' number jitna zyada hoga, lead utni hi soft aur dark hogi. Isliye 6B pencil 2B se dark chalegi.

questions.question: Drawing mein 'Contour lines' kya hoti hain?

options.B: Object ki bahari rooprekha aur andar ke details dono
options.C: Shading ke liye istemal hone wali lines

questions.explanation: Contour line drawing mein shading nahi hoti, sirf object ke edges ya outline ko define karne par focus hota hai.

questions.question: Charcoal drawing ko smudge hone se bachane ke liye kya istemal kiya jaata hai?

options.B: Tel (Oil)

questions.explanation: Fixative ek tarah ka spray hota hai jo charcoal ya pastel particles ko paper par fix kar deta hai, jisse ve phailte nahi.

questions.question: Ek 'Portrait' drawing mein kya banaya jaata hai?

options.B: Kisi vyakti ka chehra ya upari hissa

questions.explanation: Portrait ek artistik pratinidhitv hai jismein mukhya roop se ek vyakti ke chehre aur uske expressions ko capture kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: 'Gesture Drawing' ka mukhya uddeshya kya hota hai?

options.B: Subject ke action, form aur pose ko tezi se capture karna
options.D: Bahut dheere aur dhyaan se drawing karna

questions.explanation: Gesture drawing ek quick sketch hota hai jo subject ki movement aur 'feel' ko pakadne par focus karta hai, na ki details par.

questions.question: Shading ko smooth banane ke liye inmein se kis tool ka istemal kiya ja sakta hai?

options.B: Scale

questions.explanation: Blending stump (paper se bana tool) ya cotton bud ka istemal pencil ya charcoal shading ko narm aur ek saar (smooth) karne ke liye kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Madhubani painting, jise Mithila art bhi kehte hain, mool roop se kis Bharatiya rajya se hai?

options.B: Bihar

questions.explanation: Madhubani painting Bihar ke Mithila kshetra ki ek prasiddh lok kala hai, jise aam taur par mahilayein banati hain.

questions.question: Warli folk art mein aam taur par kis tarah ke aakaron (shapes) ka istemal hota hai?

options.B: Circle, triangle, aur square jaise basic geometric shapes

questions.explanation: Warli art (Maharashtra) apni saralta ke liye jaani jaati hai, jismein manushyon aur prakriti ko basic geometric aakaron se darshaya jaata hai.

questions.question: Mona Lisa, duniya ki sabse prasiddh paintings mein se ek, kisne banayi thi?

options.B: Pablo Picasso

questions.explanation: Mona Lisa Renaissance kaal ke mahan kalakar Leonardo da Vinci dwara banayi gayi ek masterpiece hai.

questions.question: Kalamkari art ka sambandh kis cheez se hai?

options.B: Lakdi par nakkaashi
options.C: Kapad par haath se painting ya block-printing

questions.explanation: Kalamkari (Andhra Pradesh aur Telangana) ek pracheen Bharatiya kala hai jismein 'kalam' yaani pen ka istemal karke kapde par chitrakari ki jaati hai.

questions.question: 'Cubism' art movement ke pioneer kaun maane jaate hain?

options.B: Salvador Dalí

questions.explanation: Pablo Picasso aur Georges Braque ne 20veen sadi ki shuruaat mein Cubism ki shuruaat ki, jismein objects ko todkar, analyze karke aur abstract form mein dobara joda jaata tha.

questions.question: Rajasthan ki kaun si painting style apne vistarit (elaborate) aur miniature chitra-kari ke liye jaani jaati hai?

options.B: Kalamkari

questions.explanation: Rajasthan mein Rajput aur Mughal shaili ki miniature painting bahut prasiddh hai, jismein darbar, shikar aur dharmik drishyon ko bariki se chitrit kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Ajanta aur Ellora ki gufayein (caves) kis liye vishwa prasiddh hain?

options.B: Apne pracheen shail-chitra (rock-cut) mandiron aur bhitti-chitron (murals) ke liye

questions.explanation: Maharashtra mein sthit Ajanta aur Ellora caves apne adbhut rock-cut architecture aur pracheen paintings ke liye UNESCO vishwa dharohar sthal hain.

questions.question: Kis Bharatiya kalakar ko 'India ka Picasso' kaha jaata tha?

options.B: Jamini Roy

questions.explanation: M.F. Husain apni modified cubist style aur aadhunik vishayon par paintings ke liye jaane jaate the, jiske karan unki tulna Picasso se ki jaati thi.

questions.question: 'Impressionism' art movement ki mukhya visheshta kya thi?

options.B: Roshni (light) aur rang ke pal-pal badalte prabhav (impression) ko capture karna
options.C: Sirf kaale aur safed rang ka istemal

questions.explanation: Impressionist kalakar jaise Claude Monet, studio ke bahar jaakar prakriti mein roshni ke badlav ko apne chote, patle brush strokes se capture karne ki koshish karte the.

questions.question: Gond painting kis Bharatiya janjati ki paramparik kala hai?

options.B: Bhil janjati

questions.explanation: Gond painting Madhya Pradesh ki Gond janjati ki lok kala hai, jismein prakriti aur kahaniyon ko dots aur lines se bhare vibrant patterns mein darshaya jaata hai.

questions.question: Raja Ravi Varma kis liye prasiddh the?

options.B: Bharatiya puranic (mythological) vishayon ko European shaili mein chitrit karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Raja Ravi Varma ek mahan Bharatiya kalakar the jinhone Hindu devi-devtaon aur puranic kahaniyon ko European academic art style mein paint karke kala ko aam logon tak pahunchaya.

questions.question: Patachitra kala ka sambandh mukhya roop se kis rajya se hai?

options.B: Punjab

questions.explanation: Patachitra Odisha ki ek paramparik, kapde par aadharit scroll painting hai, jismein puranic aur dharmik kahaniyon ko chitrit kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: 'Renaissance' kaal (period) ka art history mein kya mahatva hai?

options.B: Yeh kala, vigyan aur saahitya mein punarjagran (rebirth) ka samay tha
options.C: Is samay kala par pratibandh tha
options.D: Is samay sirf abstract art banti thi

questions.explanation: Renaissance (14th-16th century) Europe mein ek aisa daur tha jismein classical ideas ka punarjanm hua aur Leonardo da Vinci, Michelangelo jaise kalakaron ne mahan kritiyan rachin.

questions.question: Vincent van Gogh ki painting 'The Starry Night' kis art style ka udaharan hai?

options.B: Post-Impressionism

questions.explanation: 'The Starry Night' Post-Impressionism ka ek utkrisht udaharan hai, jismein kalakar apne bhavnaon (emotions) ko mote brushstrokes aur vibrant rangon se vyakt karta hai.

questions.question: Bharat mein 'Rangoli' banane ki parampara ka kya uddeshya hai?

options.B: Tyoharon aur shubh avsaron par saubhagya aur sundarta ke liye

questions.explanation: Rangoli ek paramparik Bharatiya kala hai jise tyoharon par ghar ke pravesh dwar par rangon, phoolon ya chawal se saubhagya aur atithiyon ke swagat ke liye banaya jaata hai.

questions.question: Tanjore painting ki kya khaasiyat hai?

options.A: Yeh sirf pencil se banayi jaati hai
options.B: Ismein asli sone (gold foil) aur keemti pattharon ka istemal hota hai
options.C: Yeh paani ke andar banayi jaati hai

questions.explanation: Tanjore (Thanjavur) painting, Tamil Nadu ki ek classical art form hai, jo apne rich colors, gold foil ke kaam aur glass beads ya semi-precious stones ke istemal ke liye jaani jaati hai.

questions.question: Ek art teacher ke roop mein, chhote bachhon (3-5 saal) ki class ke liye aapka sabse pehla lesson kya hoga?

options.B: Rangon se parichay aur free-hand scribbling

questions.explanation: Chhote bachhon ke liye, kala ki shuruaat khel-khel mein honi chahiye. Rangon ko pehchanna aur azaadi se lines kheenchne se unki motor skills aur creativity develop hoti hai.

questions.question: Art class mein safety ke liye sabse zaroori cheez kya hai?

options.A: Bachhon ko daant kar chup rakhna
options.B: Yeh sunishchit karna ki sabhi materials (jaise rang, glue) non-toxic hon aur tools (jaise scissors) age-appropriate hon
options.D: Bachhon ko koi bhi cheez istemal karne dena

questions.explanation: Bachhon ki suraksha sarvopari hai. Art materials non-toxic hone chahiye aur tools unki umar ke hisab se safe hone chahiye.

questions.question: Agar ek bachha kehta hai 'Mujhse drawing nahi banti', to ek art teacher ko kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Use daantna aur koshish karne ko kehna
options.B: Uski drawing khud bana dena
options.C: Use protsahit karna aur kehna ki art mein kuch bhi galat ya sahi nahi hota, bas koshish karna zaroori hai
options.D: Use class se bahar nikal dena

questions.explanation: Ek achhe teacher ko bachhe ka aatmavishwas badhana chahiye. Use yeh samjhana zaroori hai ki art process ke baare mein hai, perfection ke baare mein nahi.

questions.question: Ek 'Art Portfolio' kya hota hai?

options.B: Bachhe ke sabse achhe artworks ka collection

questions.explanation: Art portfolio ek file ya folder hota hai jismein ek student ke artworks ko samay ke saath collect kiya jaata hai, jo uski progress ko dikhata hai.

questions.question: Class mein bachhon ko art material baantne ka sabse achha tarika kya hai?

options.A: Sabhi material ko ek jagah dher kar dena
options.B: Har bachhe ke liye ek tray ya box mein zaroori samaan pehle se taiyar rakhna
options.C: Sirf apne pasandida bachhon ko material dena
options.D: Bachhon se kehna ki ve aapas mein ladkar le lein

questions.explanation: Pehle se material organize karke rakhne se samay bachta hai, classroom mein shanti bani rehti hai aur sabhi bachhon ko barabar samaan milta hai.

questions.question: Art class ke baad saaf-safai (cleanup) ki zimmedari kiski honi chahiye?

options.B: Sirf school ke safai karamchari ki

questions.explanation: Bachhon ko saaf-safai mein shaamil karne se unmein zimmedari ki bhavna aati hai aur ve apne kaam aur materials ki respect karna seekhte hain.

questions.question: Ek 'age-appropriate' art activity ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Ek aisi activity jo bahut mushkil ho
options.B: Ek aisi activity jo bachhe ki umar, uski samajh aur physical skills ke anukool ho
options.C: Ek aisi activity jo sirf ladkon ke liye ho
options.D: Ek aisi activity jo bahut mehengi ho

questions.explanation: 5 saal ke bachhe ke liye finger painting aasan hai, lekin 10 saal ke bachhe ke liye perspective drawing zyada aappropriate ho sakti hai. Activity bachhe ke vikas ke star ke anusaar honi chahiye.

questions.question: Bachhon ke artwork ko display karne ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Bachhon mein garv (pride) aur protsahan (encouragement) ki bhavna badhana
options.C: Dusre teachers se jalan paida karna

questions.explanation: Jab bachhe apna kaam display par dekhte hain, to unhe lagta hai ki unke kaam ko mahatva diya ja raha hai, jisse unka self-esteem badhta hai.

questions.question: Ek art lesson plan banate samay, aapko kin baaton ka dhyaan rakhna chahiye?

options.A: Uddeshya (Objective), Zaroori Material, Prakriya (Process), aur Mulyankan (Assessment)
options.B: Sirf activity ka naam

questions.explanation: Ek achha lesson plan poori tarah se socha-samjha hota hai, jismein yeh saaf hota hai ki bachhe kya seekhenge, kya material lagega, activity kaise hogi, aur unke kaam ko kaise parkha jaayega.

questions.question: Agar aapki class mein ek special needs wala bachha hai, to aap kya karenge?

options.A: Use art activity mein shaamil nahi karenge
options.B: Us par koi dhyaan nahi denge
options.C: Activity ko uski zarooraton ke hisab se thoda badalenge (adapt) taki woh bhi hissa le sake

questions.explanation: Inclusive education ka matlab hai sabhi bachhon ko shaamil karna. Ek teacher ko activity mein zaroori badlav (jaise mote pakadne wale brush dena) karne chahiye taki har bachha participate kar sake.

questions.question: Art education ka mukhya uddeshya kya hai?

options.A: Har bachhe ko ek professional artist banana
options.B: Bachhon mein rachnatmakta (creativity), kalpana (imagination) aur aatm-abhivyakti (self-expression) ko badhawa dena

questions.explanation: Art education ka lakshya sirf drawing sikhana nahi, balki bachhon mein creativity, problem-solving skills aur apni bhavnaon ko vyakt karne ki kshamta viksit karna hai.

questions.question: Bachhon ke kaam ka aaklan (assessment) karte samay, kis baat par sabse zyada dhyaan dena chahiye?

options.A: Sirf final product kitna sundar hai
options.B: Bachhe ne kitni koshish ki, usne process mein kya seekha aur uski creativity par
options.C: Usne kitna mehenga paper istemal kiya
options.D: Usne dusre bachhon ki nakal ki ya nahi

questions.explanation: Process-oriented assessment (prakriya-aadhaarit mulyankan) bachhe ke prayas aur vikas par kendrit hota hai, na ki sirf antimp parinaam par.

questions.question: Art class mein 'Open-ended' questions poochne ka kya laabh hai?

options.B: Yeh bachhon ko apni kalpana aur vichaaron ko vistar se batane ke liye protsahit karta hai
options.C: Isse class jaldi khatm ho jaati hai
options.D: Iska jawab sirf 'haan' ya 'naa' mein hota hai

questions.explanation: Ek 'close-ended' sawal hai 'Kya tumne neela rang istemal kiya?'. Ek 'open-ended' sawal hai 'Tumne neela rang hi kyun chuna?'. Dusra sawal bachhe ko sochne aur explain karne ka mauka deta hai.

questions.question: Art class ke liye ek positive learning environment banane ke liye kya zaroori hai?

options.A: Sakht anushasan aur saza ka dar
options.B: Bachhon ko galti karne ki azaadi dena aur unke har prayas ki sarahna karna
options.D: Bachhon ko aapas mein baat karne se rokna

questions.explanation: Ek positive environment wahan hota hai jahan bachhe bina dar ke experiment kar sakte hain aur unhe pata hota hai ki unki koshishon ko respect kiya jaayega.

questions.question: Group art project karwane ka mukhya fayda kya hai?

options.B: Yeh bachhon mein sahyog (collaboration), sanchar (communication) aur team-work ki bhavna viksit karta hai
options.C: Sirf ek bachha saara kaam karta hai
options.D: Ismein art material barbad hota hai

questions.explanation: Group projects bachhon ko ek saath milkar ek lakshya ke liye kaam karna sikhate hain, jo ek mahatvapurna life skill hai.

questions.question: Agar koi bachha hamesha ek hi cheez (jaise car) draw karta hai, to aap kya karenge?

options.A: Use car draw karne se mana kar denge
options.B: Uski car drawing ki tareef karenge aur dheere-dheere use car ke aas-paas (jaise road, ghar, log) cheezein add karne ke liye prerit karenge

questions.explanation: Bachhe ke interest ko respect karte hue, use naye ideas se jodna (scaffolding) uski creativity ko vistar dene ka sabse achha tarika hai.

questions.question: Art ko doosre vishayon (jaise Vigyan ya Ganit) ke saath kaise joda ja sakta hai?

options.A: Nahi joda ja sakta, dono alag hain
options.B: Vigyan ke liye paudhon ki drawing banwakar ya Ganit ke liye geometric shapes se pattern banwakar
options.C: Sirf art class mein doosre vishay padha kar

questions.explanation: Cross-curricular integration se learning zyada interesting aur prabhavshali ho jaati hai. Art ek visual tool hai jo doosre subjects ko samajhne mein madad kar sakta hai.

questions.question: Origami kala ka sambandh kis desh se hai aur ismein kya istemal hota hai?

options.B: China, kapda

questions.explanation: Origami Japan ki paramparik kala hai jismein kaagaz ko bina kaate ya chipkaye, sirf modkar alag-alag aakritiyan banayi jaati hain.

questions.question: Clay modeling (mitti se aakritiyan banana) se bachhon ki kaun si skill sabse zyada develop hoti hai?

options.B: Fine motor skills (haathon aur ungliyon ka kaushal)

questions.explanation: Mitti ko masalne, aakar dene aur usse chhoti-chhoti cheezein banane se bachhon ki haathon ki maanspeshiyan majboot hoti hain, jise fine motor skills kehte hain.

questions.question: Vegetable printing (sabzi se aakritiyan chhapna) ke liye inmein se kya istemal kiya ja sakta hai?

options.B: Bhindi (Ladyfinger), Pyaaz (Onion), Aalu (Potato)

questions.explanation: Bhindi ko kaatne par star jaisa, pyaaz ko kaatne par gol, aur aalu par design khodkar printing ke liye block banaye ja sakte hain.

questions.question: 'Collage' banane ki prakriya kya hai?

options.A: Sirf ek rang se painting karna
options.B: Alag-alag materials jaise kaagaz ke tukde, photos, kapde ko ek satah par chipkakar ek nayi tasveer banana

questions.explanation: Collage ek art form hai jismein alag-alag cheezon ke tukdon ko ek saath jodkar ek naya artwork taiyar kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Waste material se craft banane ka sabse bada fayda kya hai?

options.B: Yeh bachhon ko environment ke prati jaagruk banata hai aur 'Reuse' ka mahatva sikhata hai
options.C: Isse ghar mein kachra badhta hai
options.D: Yeh sirf ek hi baar kiya ja sakta hai

questions.explanation: Purani bottles, newspapers, boxes jaise waste material se craft banana bachhon ko sustainability aur creativity sikhane ka ek behtareen tarika hai.

questions.question: Puppet banane ke liye inmein se kaun sa aasan material istemal ho sakta hai?

options.B: Kaanch (Glass)
options.C: Purane moze (old socks) ya paper bags

questions.explanation: Socks aur paper bags se hand puppets banana bachhon ke liye ek aasan aur mazedar craft activity hai.

questions.question: 'Tie and Dye' (Bandhani) kala mein design kaise banaya jaata hai?

options.B: Kapde ko dhaage se alag-alag jagah par kas kar baandhkar phir rang mein dubokar

questions.explanation: Tie and Dye mein kapde ko baandh diya jaata hai. Jahaan kapda bandha hota hai, wahaan rang nahi chadhta, jisse ek pattern ban jaata hai.

questions.question: Paper Mache (kaagaz ki lugdi) banane ke liye mukhya samagri kya hai?

options.B: Kaagaz, paani aur goand (glue)

questions.explanation: Paper Mache mein purane kaagaz ko paani mein galakar aur goand milakar ek paste banaya jaata hai, jise sukha kar kathor aakritiyan banayi jaati hain.

questions.question: Block printing karne ke liye sahi kram (sequence) kya hai?

options.B: Block par rang lagana, phir kapde par chhapna
options.C: Kapde par rang lagana, phir block rakhna

questions.explanation: Sahi prakriya hai pehle lakdi ke block par rang lagana aur phir use dhyaan se kapde par dabakar design chhapna.

questions.question: Greeting card banane ki activity se bachhe kya seekhte hain?

options.B: Apni bhavnaon ko vyakt karna, design karna aur doosron ke liye kuch khaas banana

questions.explanation: Greeting card banana ek personal aur creative activity hai jo bachhon ko design ke saath-saath doosron ke prati apni feelings express karna sikhati hai.

questions.question: Bachhon ke saath kaam karne ke liye kis tarah ki mitti (clay) sabse surakshit hai?

options.B: Chemical wali mitti

questions.explanation: Bachhon ke liye hamesha non-toxic (zehar-mukt) materials ka istemal karna chahiye. Air-dry clay ko pakane ki zaroorat nahi hoti, isliye yeh classroom ke liye aadarsh hai.

questions.question: Thread painting (dhaage se painting) kaise ki jaati hai?

options.B: Ek rang mein bhigoye hue dhaage ko kaagaz ke beech mein rakhkar aur kheench kar
options.D: Dhaage ko kaat kar chipka kar

questions.explanation: Is technique mein rang wale dhaage ko ek mude hue kaagaz ke andar rakha jaata hai, upar se dabakar dhaage ko kheench liya jaata hai, jisse ek sundar, symmetrical design banta hai.

questions.question: Ek 'Nature Collage' banane ke liye aap bachhon ko kya collect karne ke liye kahenge?

options.B: Sookhi pattiyan, phool, tehniyan aur patthar

questions.explanation: Nature collage bachhon ko prakriti se jodta hai. Iske liye park ya garden se giri hui sookhi pattiyan, phool jaisi cheezein collect ki jaati hain.

questions.question: Bachhon ko paper quilling sikhane ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Yeh unke dhairya (patience) aur concentration ko badhata hai
options.C: Ismein bahut paisa kharch hota hai
options.D: Yeh sirf bade log kar sakte hain

questions.explanation: Paper quilling mein kaagaz ki patli pattiyon ko roll karke design banana hota hai. Iske liye dhyaan aur dhairya ki zaroorat hoti hai, jo bachhon ke liye ek achhi practice hai.

questions.question: Ice-cream sticks ka istemal karke kya banaya ja sakta hai?

options.B: Pen-stand, photo frame ya chhota ghar

questions.explanation: Ice-cream sticks ek versatile waste material hai jise glue se jodkar kai tarah ki decorative aur upyogi cheezein banayi ja sakti hain.

questions.question: 'Mosaic Art' kya hoti hai?

options.B: Chhote-chhote tukdon (jaise paper, tile ya glass) ko jodkar ek badi tasveer banana

questions.explanation: Mosaic ek pracheen kala hai jismein chhote-chhote rangin tukdon (tesserae) ko ek satah par jamakar ek poora chitra ya pattern taiyar kiya jaata hai.
